args:
set -eu
explain_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain)
printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'request contract:'
printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'expanded closure:'
printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'vllm native contract:'
printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'rewrite trace:'
printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'diagnostics:'
printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'verified_bundle'
printf 'explained\n'

printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'expanded closure:'

printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'diagnostics:'
printf '%s' "$explain_out" | grep -q 'verified_bundle'
printf 'explained\n'
